title: Display Elite Properties logo image before company name in Navbar

requirements.text: In Navbar.tsx, add the Elite Properties logo image (referenced from frontend/public/assets/generated/elite-logo.dim_300x300.png, rendered as an tag) immediately before the company name text 'Elite Properties Real Estate Consultant'. Apply the same gold-to-silver gradient ring border styling (box-shadow or CSS gradient ring in #C9A84C / #A8A8A8 tones) that is currently used on the logo in the standalone FeaturedCommercialCard section. Size the logo appropriately for the navbar (e.g., 40x40 or 48x48px) and ensure it aligns vertically with the company name text.

quotes: Take the logo same as of Commercial Rent and sale part before the company Name pls

acceptanceCriteria: The Elite Properties logo image appears in the navbar immediately to the left of the company name text.
The logo uses the same image source (elite-logo.dim_300x300.png) and the same gold-to-silver gradient ring/border style as the one displayed on the FeaturedCommercialCard.
The logo is sized appropriately for the navbar (approximately 40–48px) and is vertically centered with the company name.
The company name text 'Elite Properties Real Estate Consultant' remains visible, deep black (#111111), bold, and to the right of the logo.
The navbar layout does not break on desktop or mobile viewports.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
Use the existing asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/elite-logo.dim_300x300.png — do not create a new image.
The logo border/ring style in the navbar must visually match the one used on the FeaturedCommercialCard.
nonGoals: Changing the company name text color, font, or size.
Modifying the FeaturedCommercialCard component or its logo.
Adding any new sections or modifying other parts of the site.
